prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第100名持续上升至2026年第79名，近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力增强；该校在声誉文件中未出现明显舆情事件，整体声誉平稳；抖音热度总排名第80位，评价为「一般」，短视频平台关注度中等偏低，报考热度无明显异常信号；民族学A+、中国语言文学A-、社会学A-，与物理类招生专业（计算机类、电子信息类等）无直接学科映射，但对学校整体品牌有支撑作用。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电 子信息类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；本省物理类考生数2021年205920→2025年320192持续增长，2026年增至347000（较2025年增长约8.4%），竞争持续加剧；省控线（本科批 ）2021年434→2025年405，整体呈下降趋势；该校位于北京，对湖南考生有一定跨省吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年 位次波动趋势、2026年计划小幅缩招（加剧竞争约4.4%）与湖南省物理类考生数持续增长约8.4%（进一步加剧竞争），两者方向一致指向竞争加剧；同时软科排名提升对报考热度 有正向作用；预测最低位次约12985名，区间12485–13485名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 10385 → 12308 → 13989 → 14196 → 13439, showing an overall backward trend, peaking at 14196 in 2024 and slightly recovering to 13439 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 13000–14200 in the past three years; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 51 in 2021, 108 in 2022, 112 in 2023, 92 in 2024, and 91 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 87, a slight reduction of about 4.4% compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, with a continuous improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength; no significant public opinion incidents were found in the reputation documents, maintaining a stable overall reputation; Douyin popularity ranks 80th overall, rated as 'average', with moderately low attention on short video platforms and no abnormal signals in application popularity; Ethnology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Sociology A-, which have no direct subject mapping with Physics Category majors (e.g., Computer Science, Electronic Information), but support the overall brand of the university.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to have high social popularity; the number of Physics Category examinees in the province increased from 205,920 in 2021 to 320,192 in 2025, and is projected to reach 347,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 8.4% from 2025), with continuously intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) dropped from 434 in 2021 to 405 in 2025, showing an overall downward trend; the university is located in Beijing, offering some cross-provincial appeal to Hunan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the historical ranking fluctuation trend, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (intensifying competition by about 4.4%), and the continuous growth of Hunan Physics Category examinees by about 8.4% (further intensifying competition), both directions point to increased competition; meanwhile, the improvement in Soft Science ranking has a positive effect on application popularity; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12985, with a range of 12485–13485.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12485–13485, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 12500), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information; if the ranking is near the upper bound (e.g., above 13400), mainly choose Tier 3 majors for a stable application, avoiding Journalism and Communication, which has noticeably low social popularity.
